title: ER-to-Relational Mapping Process Flow
description: A step-by-step flowchart illustrating the process of converting an Entity-Relationship (ER) model into a relational database schema.
relationships: Map Weak Entity to Table (includes owner key)
Map 1:1 Relationship (foreign key in one table)
Map M:N Relationship (create a new relation/join table)
Map Multivalued Attribute (create a new table)
Final output is a set of normalized relational tables
